MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Mary Elizabeth Inn is present. Represented by Dianne Love.
Attorney John Zahghi appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Yolanda James is present.
Attorney Gregory Castle representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Jim Weixel, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle.

This case settled, the trial date of NOV-07-2011 is vacated.
